citations.quote: The accommodation support service can: Offer advice and information on finding a flat in the private sector
ENSA Advice ... can offer the following: Advice on how to find accommodation

findings.text: The brochure describes a private accommodation support service offering advice, flat viewings, and referrals.
The brochure describes ENSA Advice as a free, confidential service offering accommodation advice and lease review.
No evidence in the provided source that the brochure was provided to Anfal or that Anfal accessed any support service.
Only one source (NAP-SRC-0014) was provided; no other matter sources were available to search for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal.

proposed_artifacts.content:
# Search Result: Brochure Provision / Support Service Access by Anfal

**Source Reviewed:** NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025)

**Findings:**
- The brochure describes a private accommodation support service (contact: privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk) and ENSA Advice (contact: 0131 229 8791 / ensa.advice@napier.ac.uk).
- No record of provision of the brochure to Anfal or any named individual.
- No record of Anfal accessing the support service or ENSA Advice.

**Gap:** Only one source was available. Other matter sources (e.g., correspondence logs, support service records, accommodation office files) were not provided.

**Recommendation:** Proceed with follow-up task to search other matter sources for any records of brochure distribution or support service contact involving Anfal.
proposed_artifacts.title: Brochure Provision and Support Service Access Search Result

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search all available matter sources (e.g., correspondence logs, accommodation office records, support service case notes, email archives) for any record that the Private Accommodation Brochure 2025 (NAP-SRC-0014) was provided to Anfal, or that Anfal contacted or used the private accommodation support service or ENSA Advice. Report any findings with citations.
proposed_tasks.title: Search additional matter sources for records of brochure provision or support service access by Anfal

risk_flags.description: No evidence that Anfal received the brochure or used support services; this gap may affect claims about reasonable adjustments or duty of care.

summary: Reviewed NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025) for brochure provision or support service access by Anfal. The brochure describes a private accommodation support service and ENSA Advice but contains no record of provision to any named individual. No other matter sources were provided. No evidence of Anfal's receipt of the brochure or use of support services was found. A follow-up task is proposed to search other matter sources for such records.

uncertainties.reason: The source material does not contain any reference to Anfal or any individual recipient of the brochure or support services.
The work order provided only one source; other matter sources may exist but were not included in this context pack.
